ICAIW 2025: Workshops at the 8th International Conference on Applied Informatics, ICAI 2025, Ben Guerir, Marruecos, CEUR Workshop Proceedings.

title: Creación de un modelo integral de gestión del conocimiento para las PyMEs argentinas
citation: Straccia, L.; Pollo-Cattaneo, Ma. F.; Baruzzini, B.; Berro, C. (2025). Creación de un modelo integral de gestión del conocimiento para las PyMEs argentinas. XXVII Workshop de Investigadores en Ciencias de la Computación: WICC 2025. Universidad Nacional de Cuyo, Mendoza, Argentina.

title: Knowledge Management: Innovation, Technology and Ontologies
description: Knowledge is an essential resource to create value for organizations and requires adequate Knowledge Management to generate, retain, and apply it and obtain competitive advantages. This research analyzes the presence of Knowledge Management, the views considered, and the technology aspects that are most relevant.
citation: Straccia, L., Pollo-Cattaneo, M.F. (2024). Knowledge Management: Innovation, Technology and Ontologies. ICAIW 2024: Workshops at the 7th International Conference on Applied Informatics, ICAI 2024, Viña del Mar, Chile, October 24–26, CEUR Workshop Proceedings.

title: Study of the Diagnosis of Knowledge Management in Software Development Companies
description: Knowledge management is addressed here through a systematic mapping study focused on diagnosis and maturity in software development companies.
citation: Ferrer, L. (2024). Study of the Diagnosis of Knowledge Management in Software Development Companies. ICAIW 2024: Workshops at the 7th International Conference on Applied Informatics, ICAI 2024, Viña del Mar, Chile, October 24–26, CEUR Workshop Proceedings.

title: Analysis of the Current State of Knowledge Management Methods and Techniques Applied in Argentinian Work Cooperatives
description: This study explores the current situation of Argentine work cooperatives concerning knowledge management and the development of collaborative knowledge societies.
citation: Brest, F. (2024). Analysis of the Current State of Knowledge Management Methods and Techniques Applied in Argentinian Work Cooperatives. ICAIW 2024: Workshops at the 7th International Conference on Applied Informatics, ICAI 2024, Viña del Mar, Chile, October 24–26, CEUR Workshop Proceedings.

title: Gestión del Conocimiento: actividades, tecnología y modelos de medición
description: Este trabajo presenta enfoques de la gestión del conocimiento, proyectos de investigación del grupo, resultados obtenidos y próximas actividades y publicaciones.
citation: Gestión del Conocimiento: actividades, tecnología y modelos de medición. WICC 2024: Workshop de Investigadores en Ciencias de la Computación, Puerto Madryn, Chubut, Buenos Aires.

title: Descriptors for Technology Key Area in a Knowledge Management Maturity Model
description: The paper focuses on maturity models for knowledge management and proposes descriptors and a questionnaire for the technology key area.
citation: Straccia, L., Pollo-Cattaneo, M.F. (2023). Descriptors for Technology Key Area in a Knowledge Management Maturity Model. ICAIW 2023: Workshops at the 6th International Conference on Applied Informatics, ICAI 2023, Guayaquil, Ecuador, October 25–27, CEUR Workshop Proceedings.

title: Knowledge Management Model: A Process View
description: This paper analyzes the activities and stages of knowledge management and proposes a model that includes learning, retrieval, structuring, socialization, dissemination, identification, creation, and acquisition.
citation: Straccia, L., Pollo-Cattaneo, M.F., Maulini, A. (2023). Knowledge Management Model: A Process View. In: Computational Science and Its Applications – ICCSA 2023. ICCSA 2023. Lecture Notes in Computer Science, vol 13956. Springer, Cham. https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-031-36805-9_39

title: Creación de un observatorio tecnológico de la gestión del conocimiento en la ciudad de Buenos Aires
description: El trabajo presenta el objetivo de construir un observatorio tecnológico para describir, analizar y mostrar la situación actual de la gestión del conocimiento en la Ciudad de Buenos Aires.
citation: Creación de un observatorio tecnológico de la gestión del conocimiento en la ciudad de Buenos Aires. WICC 2023: XXV Workshop de Investigadores en Ciencias de la Computación, Junín, Buenos Aires.

title: Predictive Models for Intelligent Decision Support in Healthcare
description: Trabajo simulado para maquetado. Explora el uso de modelos predictivos y sistemas inteligentes para asistir en procesos de decisión clínica y análisis de riesgo.
